[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [layering](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeLayer](../../TextmodeLayer.md) / resetCamera

# Method: resetCamera()

```ts
resetCamera(): void;
```

Reset this layer to default auto camera behavior.

## Returns

`void`
